column2: Create lead with all fields filled
column3: Verify that a lead can be created with all fields populated.
column4: User is logged in as Admin. Dashboard is displayed.
column5:
1. Click "+ Create Lead".
2. Enter Name: Jane Smith
3. Enter Email: jane.smith@corp.com
4. Enter Phone: +1 (555) 999-8888
5. Enter Company: Tech Corp
6. Enter Job Title: VP of Sales
7. Select Industry: Technology
8. Select Source: LinkedIn
9. Select Priority: High
10. Select Status: New
11. Enter Deal Value: 75000
12. Set Expected Close Date: a future date
13. Set Follow-up Date: a future date
14. Check "Lead is qualified"
15. Check "Opted in for email communications"
16. Enter Notes: Interested in enterprise plan
17. Click "Create Lead".
column6:
Verify that:
1) Lead is created with all fields populated.
2) Lead appears in the list with correct Priority (High), Status (New), Deal Value ($75,000), and Source (LinkedIn).

column2: E2E: Login - Create Lead - Verify in List
column3: Verify the complete happy path flow end-to-end.
column4: None (fresh session).
column5:
1. Navigate to https://v0-lead-manager-app.vercel.app
2. Login with admin@company.com / Admin@123
3. Verify dashboard loads with leads table.
4. Note the total lead count.
5. Click "+ Create Lead".
6. Enter Name: E2E Test Lead
7. Enter Email: e2e@test.com
8. Select Priority: High
9. Click "Create Lead".
10. Verify success message appears.
11. Verify lead count increased by 1.
12. Search for "E2E Test Lead".
13. Verify the lead appears with correct data.
column6:
Verify that:
1) Complete flow succeeds without errors.
2) New lead is visible in the list with all entered data matching.

column6:
